summary: Correct the generated `sites` read command example and live happy-args.
reason: The single GET-by-id resource renders as `sites <site_id>` (there is no `sites get` subcommand); the generated example said `sites get e5051f46`, which routes the literal 'get' as the id and 404s. Repointed example/happy-args at a real public site so the live gate exercises a working read.
validated_outcome: Live dogfood `sites` happy path passes against the real API.
